query:
UPDATE agent_crm_profiles acp
JOIN users u ON u.id = acp.userId
SET acp.orbitEnabled = 1
WHERE u.id = 60445;

SELECT COUNT(*) as affected FROM users u
JOIN agent_crm_profiles acp ON acp.userId = u.id
WHERE u.crmAccess = 1 AND acp.orbitEnabled = 0;
